allow: Bash(node -e "require\(''./data.js''\); const d = window.FM26Data; console.log\(''Preset OM existe:'', !!d.PRESETS[''om-marseille-2026'']\); const p = d.PRESETS[''om-marseille-2026'']; console.log\(''Nom:'', p.name\); console.log\(''Formation IP:'', p.formationIP\); console.log\(''Formation OOP:'', p.formationOOP\); console.log\(''Roles IP count:'', Object.keys\(p.rolesIP\).length\); console.log\(''Roles OOP count:'', Object.keys\(p.rolesOOP\).length\); console.log\(''Has playerInstructions:'', !!p.playerInstructions\); console.log\(''PI keys:'', p.playerInstructions ? Object.keys\(p.playerInstructions\) : ''none''\);")

Bash(node -e "global.window = {}; require\(''./data.js''\); const d = window.FM26Data; console.log\(''OK:'', !!d.PRESETS[''om-marseille-2026'']\); const p = d.PRESETS[''om-marseille-2026'']; console.log\(p.name, p.formationIP, p.formationOOP\); console.log\(''rolesIP:'', Object.keys\(p.rolesIP\).length\); console.log\(''rolesOOP:'', Object.keys\(p.rolesOOP\).length\); console.log\(''PI:'', !!p.playerInstructions, p.playerInstructions ? Object.keys\(p.playerInstructions\).length : 0\);")
